milestones.title: 来到这个世界
milestones.narrative: 五斤九两，哭声嘹亮，响彻整个走廊。
milestones.narrative_en: Born 2.95kg. Tiny but loud — her cry echoed through the hallway.

milestones.title: 满月
milestones.narrative: 从医院到新家，新手爸妈的手忙脚乱。开始能盯着光影看，喜欢听人说话。
milestones.narrative_en: From hospital to new home — rookie parents figuring it out. She started tracking light and loved hearing voices.

milestones.title: 心脏检查通过
milestones.narrative: 新生儿心脏杂音的阴影终于散去。医生说没问题，会自行闭合。
milestones.narrative_en: The newborn heart murmur scare was over. Doctor said it would close on its own — and it did.

milestones.title: 双手会摸脸了
milestones.narrative: 突然伸手摸爸爸的脸。这种小事，是父母最感动的瞬间。
milestones.narrative_en: She reached out and touched Dad's face. The smallest things hit the hardest.

milestones.title: 开始长牙了
milestones.narrative: 下颚两颗门牙冒头了。外面的世界很好奇，第一次坐婴儿车出去兜风。
milestones.narrative_en: Two bottom teeth coming in. She discovered the outside world — first stroller ride.

milestones.title: 封控里的宝宝
milestones.narrative: 什么都不知道，只知道要吃要玩。在围栏里学会了翻身。
milestones.narrative_en: She had no idea what was happening outside. Inside the playpen, she learned to roll over.

milestones.title: 手脚有力，满地爬
milestones.narrative: 辅食乖了不少，喜欢侧着单手撑地。从身体发育到认知世界，每一天都在变。
milestones.narrative_en: Solids going better. One-arm side-lying like a pro. Every day brings something new.

milestones.title: 学会招手打招呼
milestones.narrative: 对着你笑出声，握着小手开心地招手——你好、拜拜。有回应了，太美好了。
milestones.narrative_en: Laughing out loud, waving hello and bye-bye. When she responded, everything was worth it.

milestones.title: 一岁啦
milestones.narrative: 时间见证变化。每天一秒视频看着她长大，心里同样温暖。
milestones.narrative_en: Time witnesses change. Watching her grow through daily one-second videos — warmth every time.

milestones.title: 熟练走路、转弯、快跑
milestones.narrative: 能熟练地走路、转弯、后退了。一两百米外招手小步快跑过来，特别治愈。
milestones.narrative_en: Walking, turning, backing up — all proficient. Running toward us from 100m away, waving. Pure healing.

milestones.title: 走路完全没问题了
milestones.narrative: 走路没问题，喜欢找爸爸妈妈求抱，抬头仰望的时候真的很可爱。
milestones.narrative_en: Walking, running, looking up at Mom and Dad asking to be held. Heart-melting.

milestones.title: 开口说话了
milestones.narrative: 爸爸、哥哥、姐姐、耳机。还叫不出妈妈，但喜欢踢球，同龄人里的小能手。
milestones.narrative_en: Dad, brother, sister, headphones. Couldn't say Mom yet. But already the best kicker among her peers.

milestones.title: 什么都懂，就是还说不全
milestones.narrative: 看到绘本里的球就站起来踢，说到车就用手"咻"一声划过。有自己理解世界的方式。
milestones.narrative_en: Saw a ball in a book and kicked. Heard 'car' and whooshed her hand. Her own way of understanding the world.

milestones.title: 理解力爆发期
milestones.narrative: 什么都听得懂了，用手指指挥大人。每天的变化让人惊喜又应接不暇。
milestones.narrative_en: Understood everything. Pointing to direct adults. Daily changes both thrilling and overwhelming.

milestones.title: 学习最快的时光
milestones.narrative: 吸收新事物的速度惊人，每天都在进步，是成长中最不可思议的阶段。
milestones.narrative_en: Absorbing new things at an astonishing pace. The most incredible phase of growth.

milestones.title: 语言大爆发
milestones.narrative: "爸爸妈妈来"喊个不停，开始认路了——知道怎么走回家。
milestones.narrative_en: "Mama Papa come!" nonstop. Started recognizing the way home.

milestones.title: 两岁啦
milestones.narrative: 从刚出生未张开的婴儿，到现在每天活蹦乱跳。乐高搭积木、滑滑梯、荡秋千、玩拼图，精力无限。
milestones.narrative_en: From a tiny newborn to a ball of boundless energy. LEGO, slides, swings, puzzles — nonstop.

milestones.title: 小大人模样
milestones.narrative: 办了图书证，卡通绘本爱不释手。大部分日常对话都能接上，戒掉了夜奶。
milestones.narrative_en: Got her first library card. Picture books everywhere. Could hold daily conversations. Finally sleeping through the night.

milestones.title: 话多、学得快
milestones.narrative: 一个单词说完就记住，下次冷不丁就用上了。拼图、七巧板不在话下，一个人能安静玩二十分钟。
milestones.narrative_en: Hears a word once, uses it later when you least expect it. Puzzles, tangrams — no problem. 20 minutes of solo play.

milestones.title: 告别纸尿裤
milestones.narrative: 两岁半，如厕训练完成。说话已经很流利了，像个真正的「大孩子」。
milestones.narrative_en: Two and a half. Potty training done. Speaking fluently — a real big kid now.

milestones.title: 第一天上托班
milestones.narrative: 人生第一次离开家人走进教室。
milestones.narrative_en: The very first time leaving family and walking into a classroom.

milestones.title: 有了自己的小书桌
milestones.narrative: 画画、数学、认字、英语都安排起来了。家里贴满了自己的作品。可以有大姐姐的样子了。
milestones.narrative_en: Painting, math, reading, English — all set up. Her artworks cover every wall. Becoming a big sister figure.

milestones.title: 四天，从哭到笑
milestones.narrative: 换幼儿园的头几天哭得很厉害，第四天就开始开开心心上学了。适应力惊人。
milestones.narrative_en: Cried hard the first days at a new kindergarten. By day four — happy to go. Incredible adaptability.

milestones.title: 正式入园
milestones.narrative: 作为班上的大姐姐，很快就习惯了。托班的经历让她比其他小朋友更从容。
milestones.narrative_en: Settled right in as the big sister of the class. Her earlier nursery experience made her more confident than the others.

milestones.title: 第一次住院
milestones.narrative: 肺炎入院，抽静脉血、长期输液，九天时间。比新冠猛得多，但福福很勇敢。
milestones.narrative_en: Pneumonia. IV drips, blood draws, nine days in hospital. Tougher than COVID, but Lucky was brave.

milestones.title: 大理旅居
milestones.narrative: 和爸爸妈妈走南闯北，很有福气也很勇敢。洱海边的不期而遇，苍山下的社区食堂。
milestones.narrative_en: Traveling across China with Mom and Dad. Unexpected beauty by Erhai Lake, community canteens under Cangshan.

milestones.title: 英语启蒙 Day 1
milestones.narrative: 跟唱 red dress，不太情愿，但跟着了。
milestones.narrative_en: Sang along to 'red dress' — reluctantly, but she did it.

milestones.title: 主动用英文自我介绍
milestones.narrative: 跟幼儿园老师说 "I'm Lucky"。Day 3 就敢开口。
milestones.narrative_en: "I'm Lucky" — introduced herself to her kindergarten teacher in English. Day 3 courage.

milestones.title: 第一周全勤 7/7
milestones.narrative: 连续 7 天不间断。比大人的习惯养成还稳。
milestones.narrative_en: 7 days straight, no misses. Better habit discipline than most adults.

milestones.title: 单日学 6 个昆虫词
milestones.narrative: 创纪录的一天。学东西的速度在加快。
milestones.narrative_en: A record day. The pace of learning was accelerating.

milestones.title: 跳绳课害怕哭了
milestones.narrative: 不敢进去，哭了。社交挑战的第一个真实场景。
milestones.narrative_en: Too scared to go in. Cried. The first real social challenge.

milestones.title: 开始学数学
milestones.narrative: 《摩比爱数学》中班课程启动。跳绳时英语数到 40。
milestones.narrative_en: Started structured math. Counted to 40 in English while jumping rope.

milestones.title: 主动邀请陌生小朋友一起跳
milestones.title_en: Invited a Stranger to Jump Together
milestones.narrative: 从一周前不敢进跳绳课，到现在主动找陌生小朋友玩。7 天逆转。
milestones.narrative_en: From too scared to enter, to inviting a stranger to play. 7-day turnaround.

milestones.title: 第一本英文绘本精读完成
milestones.narrative: The Very Hungry Caterpillar，逐句精读。从听到读的跨越。
milestones.narrative_en: The Very Hungry Caterpillar — read sentence by sentence. The leap from hearing to reading.

milestones.title: 第一个请求句型
milestones.narrative: "Can I have something, please?" 不只是模仿，开始理解礼貌请求的结构。
milestones.narrative_en: "Can I have something, please?" Not just mimicking — she understood the structure of polite requests.

milestones.title: 第一个自发完整句
milestones.narrative: "Daddy I want five little ducks" — 不是重复，是主动表达需求。第二天又说 "I want to listen"。句型开始迁移。
milestones.narrative_en: "Daddy I want five little ducks" — not repetition. Active intent. Next day: "I want to listen." Pattern transfer.
